problem_solved: Provides telemedicine solutions enabling remote consultations and diagnostics for healthcare providers, including dermatology, cardiology, and infectious disease screening. Their DTM (Diagnostic TeleMedicine) platform helps clinics scale specialist care without requiring in-person visits.
customers: GP practices, hospitals, regional healthcare networks, municipal health services (GGD)
key_features: Teledermatology for remote skin condition diagnosis
Ambulatory ECG monitoring and cardiac diagnostics
Integration with Dutch healthcare infrastructure (LSP/Huisartsenposten)
business_model: SaaS subscription to healthcare providers with per-consult pricing
varden_potential: Strong replicability potential - the DTM platform model (telemedicine for specialist diagnostics) could be adapted for sexual health clinics, particularly for remote STI consultation and follow-up care. The Dutch market is mature and willing to pay for digital health solutions.

problem_solved: Integrated healthcare provider and distributor delivering medical supplies, pharmaceuticals, and care coordination services to patients with chronic conditions. For sexual health specifically, they provide HIV medication delivery, PrEP distribution, and homecare coordination.
customers: Patients (direct), pharmacies, hospitals, care institutions, insurers
key_features: Direct-to-patient medication delivery for chronic conditions including HIV
Integrated care coordination between specialists and primary care
Digital ordering platforms for B2B healthcare providers
business_model: Hybrid: product distribution (pharmacy/medical supplies) + care services contracts with insurers/providers
varden_potential: Medium replicability - the medication delivery + care coordination model for HIV/PrEP patients is proven but requires strong logistics infrastructure. The digital ordering platform component could be replicated more easily for STI testing kit distribution.

problem_solved: Provides comprehensive medical information databases and clinical decision support tools for healthcare professionals. Their platform includes drug interaction databases, therapeutic recommendations, and patient education materials covering sexual health treatments including HIV antiretrovirals and PrEP.
customers: Hospitals, GP practices, pharmacists, healthcare institutions, pharmaceutical companies
key_features: Vidal Recos - therapeutic recommendation summaries aligned with French health authority guidelines
Drug interaction and contraindication databases
Patient education materials for sexual health conditions
business_model: SaaS subscriptions to healthcare professionals and institutions; content licensing to EHR vendors
varden_potential: High replicability potential - the clinical decision support model is universally applicable. Could extend to include sexual health-specific protocols, STI treatment algorithms, and PrEP prescribing guidance. The content licensing model scales well.

problem_solved: National health data platform enabling secure, unified access to French healthcare data for research and quality improvement projects. Supports epidemiological research on STI trends, HIV treatment outcomes, and public health surveillance for sexual health.
customers: Research institutions, public health agencies, healthcare organizations, academic medical centers
key_features: Secure, compliant access to SNDS (French national health data system)
Data governance and privacy-preserving analytics infrastructure
Open-source community and project support
business_model: Government-funded public infrastructure; free access for approved research projects
varden_potential: Low direct replicability (government entity) but the data platform architecture and governance model could inform similar initiatives. The model of secure health data access for research is valuable for STI/HIV epidemiological surveillance systems.

problem_solved: B2B supplier of laboratory equipment and consumables to clinical laboratories, including those performing STI testing. Provides procurement simplification and inventory management for diagnostic labs.
customers: Clinical laboratories, hospital lab departments, research institutions, diagnostic centers
key_features: Comprehensive catalog of laboratory consumables and equipment
Express ordering system with real-time stock visibility
Technical support and product selection assistance
varden_potential: Low replicability for Varden's software focus - this is a physical product distribution business. However, the digital ordering platform for lab supplies could be adapted for STI self-sampling kit distribution to clinics.

problem_solved: French cooperative providing business software for healthcare, including secure pharmacy preparation processes. Their health software division supports medication safety and traceability, applicable to HIV/PrEP medication management in sexual health clinics.
customers: Hospital pharmacies, clinic pharmacies, healthcare institutions, pharmaceutical preparation units
key_features: Pharmaceutical preparation process security and traceability
Collaborative workflow management for healthcare teams
Integration with French healthcare IT infrastructure
business_model: SaaS licensing and on-premise deployment with implementation services
varden_potential: Medium replicability - the medication traceability and preparation security software is relevant for PrEP/HIV medication management in sexual health clinics. The cooperative business model is interesting but less relevant for scaling.

problem_solved: Leading French healthcare IT company providing comprehensive EHR systems for hospitals, imaging centers, and laboratories. Their DPI (Dossier Patient Informatisé) covers the full patient journey from primary care to hospital. Relevant to sexual health through infectious disease modules and chronic condition management.
customers: Public hospitals, private clinics, imaging centers, clinical laboratories, primary care providers
key_features: Comprehensive EHR/DPI spanning primary care to hospital
Specialty modules including infectious disease tracking
HDS-certified hosting and integration with French national health infrastructure (Ségur)
business_model: Hybrid: software licensing (on-premise/cloud) + hosting services + implementation/support contracts
varden_potential: Medium-high replicability - Softway is a major competitor in French hospital IT. Their model of integrated EHR from primary care to hospital is relevant for sexual health clinic management. However, they are a large established player - opportunity may be in specialized sexual health modules that complement their core offerings.

problem_solved: Digital healthcare communication platform connecting hospitals, laboratories, and specialists in Belgium. Provides eForms for structured medical requests, unified messaging for secure communication, and convention management - all relevant for sexual health clinics coordinating with labs for STI testing.
customers: Hospitals, clinical laboratories, radiologists, medical specialists, healthcare networks
key_features: eForms for digital lab and radiology request forms
Unified Messaging for secure healthcare communication
Convention management for medical agreements
business_model: SaaS subscription to healthcare organizations with per-transaction pricing for forms/messaging
varden_potential: Medium-high replicability - the secure communication platform model for healthcare provider coordination is directly applicable to sexual health clinics. The Belgian eHealth standards are similar to Dutch/French systems, making cross-border replication feasible. Integration with lab ordering is particularly relevant for STI testing workflows.
